cards.title: Risk Assessment Focus
cards.content:
• Concept of Morbidity vs. Mortality
• Medical, Non-Medical & Tele-underwriting
• Fraud Management (Hard vs. Soft Fraud)
• Anti-selection Prevention

cards.title: Key Definition
cards.content:
Mortality: Probability of Death.
Morbidity: Probability of falling ill/injured. 
Health insurance focuses 100% on MORBIDITY risk.

cards.title: 1. Tele-underwriting
cards.content: Gathering medical history over the phone by doctors. Speeds up policy issuance and reduces physical tests.

cards.title: 2. Medical vs Non-Medical
cards.content:
Medical: Requires physical tests (ECG, Blood test).
Non-Medical: Issued based only on proposal form declarations.

cards.title: Anti-Selection
cards.content: The tendency of sick people to buy insurance. Underwriting prevents this to protect the company.

cards.title: Hard vs Soft Fraud
cards.content:
Hard Fraud: Deliberate (Fake bills for treatment that NEVER happened).
Soft Fraud: Exaggerated (Staying in hospital longer than needed just to claim more).

cards.title: Q2. Fake bill for no treatment?
